student.name: YouTube Comment
student.text: I learned a lot from this style of video, any chance you could make a video similar to this for every future chapter? (Even ones without practice problems. Just being able to see all the important formulas in one place is helpful). Thanks

instructor.name: Spidey Physics
instructor.text: Thank you for the comment I'm glad I could help! Of course I gotchu for future videos, I also like to do the final exam equation sheet study guide so I'll release that near the end of the course !
